stat.title: Error-Assisted Runs
stat.subtitle: Runs scored with an error in the play.

notableEvents.label: J.T. Realmuto — 3 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Top 6 · 4–0 · J.T. Realmuto doubles (11) on a line drive to left fielder Riley Greene. Bryce Harper scores. Alec Bohm scores. Brandon Marsh scores. J.T. Realmuto to 3rd. J.T. Realmuto advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by shortstop Kevin McGonigle.

notableEvents.label: Gabriel Moreno — 2 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Top 1 · 2–0 · Gabriel Moreno singles on a line drive to right fielder Kyle Tucker. Ketel Marte scores. Corbin Carroll scores. Gabriel Moreno to 2nd. Throwing error by right fielder Kyle Tucker.

notableEvents.label: Luis Campusano — 2 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Top 5 · 2–1 · Luis Campusano reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by second baseman Michael Massey. Ty France scores. Miguel Andujar scores. Fielding error by second baseman Michael Massey.

notableEvents.label: Carson Benge — 2 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Bot 5 · 2–5 · Carson Benge singles on a fly ball to center fielder Lane Thomas. A.J. Ewing scores. Juan Soto scores. Carson Benge to 3rd. Throwing error by center fielder Lane Thomas.

notableEvents.label: Jonny DeLuca — 2 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Top 1 · 2–0 · Jonny DeLuca singles on a ground ball to left fielder Jarren Duran. Junior Caminero scores. Ryan Vilade scores. Cedric Mullins to 3rd. Jonny DeLuca to 2nd. Throwing error by left fielder Jarren Duran.

notableEvents.label: Andrés Chaparro — 2 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Top 6 · 12–2 · Andrés Chaparro singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Henry Bolte. James Wood scores. Curtis Mead scores. Andrés Chaparro to 2nd. Andrés Chaparro advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by center fielder Henry Bolte.

notableEvents.label: Lourdes Gurriel Jr. — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Top 6 · 3–3 · Lourdes Gurriel Jr. reaches on a fielder's choice. Geraldo Perdomo scores. Gabriel Moreno to 3rd. Throwing error by third baseman Max Muncy.

notableEvents.label: Mauricio Dubón — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Top 9 · 4–3 · Mauricio Dubón reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Masyn Winn. Ozzie Albies scores. Michael Harris II to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Narváez — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Bot 6 · 0–6 · Carlos Narváez singles on a soft bunt ground ball to catcher Nick Fortes. Romy Gonzalez scores. Jarren Duran to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Nick Fortes.

notableEvents.label: Chase Meidroth — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Bot 5 · 1–9 · Wild pitch by pitcher José Suarez. Kyle Teel scores. Tristan Peters to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Shea Langeliers.

notableEvents.label: Brayan Rocchio — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Top 7 · 5–3 · Brayan Rocchio hits a sacrifice bunt. Fielding error by pitcher Taylor Rogers. Steven Kwan scores. Chase DeLauter to 2nd. Brayan Rocchio to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Zach McKinstry — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Bot 6 · 2–4 · Zach McKinstry hits a sacrifice bunt. Throwing error by pitcher Tim Mayza. Matt Vierling scores. Eduardo Valencia to 3rd. Zach McKinstry to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nick Allen — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Top 8 · 2–8 · Nick Allen singles on a ground ball to shortstop CJ Abrams. Zach Dezenzo scores. Nick Allen to 2nd. Throwing error by shortstop CJ Abrams.

notableEvents.label: Juan Soto — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Bot 3 · 2–1 · Juan Soto out on a sacrifice fly to left fielder Jarren Duran. Brett Baty scores. Throwing error by third baseman Caleb Durbin.

notableEvents.label: Jacob Wilson — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Top 4 · 1–3 · Jacob Wilson reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Zach McKinstry. Tyler Soderstrom scores. Jacob Wilson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Nick Gonzales — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Bot 1 · 0–2 · Nick Gonzales reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Joey Ortiz. Bryan Reynolds scores. Esmerlyn Valdez to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Willy Adames — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Bot 8 · 1–2 · Grant McCray steals (2) 2nd base. Rafael Devers scores. Grant McCray to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Hunter Goodman.

notableEvents.label: Luis Arraez — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Top 6 · 3–0 · Luis Arraez reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Cole Young. Jung Hoo Lee scores. Drew Gilbert to 3rd. Drew Cavanaugh to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Bryce Eldridge — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Top 3 · 1–0 · Bryce Eldridge singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Luke Raley. Drew Gilbert scores. Luis Arraez to 2nd. Fielding error by center fielder Luke Raley.

notableEvents.label: Nick Fortes — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Bot 8 · 1–6 · Nick Fortes singles on a soft ground ball to pitcher Michael Rucker. Ben Williamson scores. Nick Fortes to 2nd. Nick Fortes advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by pitcher Michael Rucker.

notableEvents.label: Myles Straw — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Top 8 · 6–0 · Myles Straw grounds into a force out, shortstop Willy Adames to second baseman Luis Arraez. Daulton Varsho scores. Kazuma Okamoto to 3rd. Alejandro Kirk out at 2nd. Myles Straw to 1st. Myles Straw advances to 1st, on a missed catch error by first baseman Rafael Devers, assist to second baseman Luis Arraez.

notableEvents.label: Keibert Ruiz — 1 error-assisted run
